name: Mississippi Department of Mental Health - Division of Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities
description: State agency providing services and supports for Mississippians with intellectual and developmental disabilities including waiver programs and community services.

name: Mississippi Early Intervention (First Steps)
description: Part C early intervention program for infants and toddlers birth to age 3 with developmental delays or disabilities.

name: The Arc of Mississippi
description: Statewide advocacy organization for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities, providing resources and community support.

name: Special Olympics Mississippi
description: Year-round sports training and competition for children and adults with intellectual disabilities throughout Mississippi.

name: Disability Rights Mississippi
description: Federally designated protection and advocacy organization providing legal advocacy and rights protection for Mississippians with disabilities.

name: Mississippi Respite Care Program
description: Respite care services and referrals for family caregivers of individuals with disabilities throughout Mississippi.

name: Camp Tik-A-Witha
description: Summer camp program for children and teens with disabilities providing outdoor recreation and social experiences.

name: Mississippi Project START (Success Through Assistive/Rehabilitative Technology)
description: Mississippi's assistive technology program providing device demonstrations, equipment loans, and AT services for individuals with disabilities.

name: Mississippi ABLE Account
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts for individuals with disabilities to save without affecting eligibility for public benefits.

name: Mississippi Medicaid Waiver Programs (IDD Waiver)
description: Home and community-based Medicaid waiver programs for individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities to receive services in their communities.

name: JATRAN Paratransit (Jackson)
description: Paratransit transportation service for individuals with disabilities in the Jackson metropolitan area.

name: Mississippi Home Corporation - Accessible Housing
description: State housing finance agency providing resources for accessible and affordable housing for Mississippians with disabilities.

name: UMMC Center for Advancement of Youth (Developmental Pediatrics)
description: Developmental and behavioral pediatrics at the University of Mississippi Medical Center providing comprehensive evaluations and care for children with developmental concerns.

name: Methodist Rehabilitation Center Pediatric Therapy
description: Pediatric rehabilitation and therapy services including physical, occupational, and speech therapy for children with disabilities.

name: Mississippi Department of Rehabilitation Services - Employment
description: State vocational rehabilitation program providing employment services, job training, and placement for Mississippians with disabilities.

name: The Arc of Northeast Mississippi
description: Volunteer-based local Arc chapter serving northeast Mississippi, providing advocacy and community programs for individuals with intellectual, developmental, and other disabilities.
